title: When automating a dashboard to be emailed, include the dashboard in the email body
excerpt: It would be really great that if we send it out a dashboard via an automated email (or one off) that it includes the snapshot of the dashboard at the time the email is sent instead of requiring the user to click on a but…

posts.author: shamrell (Steve Hamrell)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really great that if we send it out a dashboard via an automated email (or one off) that it includes the snapshot of the dashboard at the time the email is sent instead of requiring the user to click on a button and be taken in to Monday. I have one that goes to the C-Suite here and they just want the data not to have to log into Monday etc. So now i do it manually to make it easier on them. This is really good for users who are not daily users, but are stakeholders (like the C-Suite).

posts.author: Regan (Regan Ludwar)
posts.cookedHtml: Great idea! I do this for other work with Tableau and it’s a great feature.
